main.description: An observed AS-OF state of a public capital bucket — a FACTUAL metric (return / net-fund-flow / volume z-score / yield / spread / drawdown / outstanding-usd) from public market data. outstanding-usd = the observed total SIZE (stock) of the bucket in USD trillions (the money-pyramid layer). Append-only (G10): a new observation is a NEW record, never an overwrite. NON-advisory (G2): a metric, never a signal/rating/target.

metric.description: G2 — factual observed metrics only; no rating / signal / target. outstanding-usd = total stock size in USD trillions (money-pyramid layer).

value.description: finite observed value in the metric's natural unit.
